name: Grog Ironfist
notes: Test character — Barbarian 5. Rage 3/day, Reckless Attack, Extra Attack, Fast Movement.

level1Features.name: Rage
level1Features.description: Bonus action. Advantage on STR checks/saves, +2 damage (melee/thrown), resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing. 3 uses/long rest. Ends if no attack or damage taken.

level1Features.name: Unarmored Defense
level1Features.description: AC = 10 + DEX mod + CON mod when not wearing armor.

allFeatures.name: Rage
allFeatures.description: Bonus action: 3 uses/long rest. +2 rage damage at level 5.

allFeatures.name: Unarmored Defense
allFeatures.description: AC = 10 + DEX + CON when no armor.

allFeatures.name: Reckless Attack
allFeatures.description: Advantage on melee attacks; attackers gain advantage on you until next turn.

allFeatures.name: Danger Sense
allFeatures.description: Advantage on DEX saves against visible effects.

allFeatures.name: Frenzy
allFeatures.description: While raging: bonus action melee attack. Suffer exhaustion after rage.

allFeatures.name: Extra Attack
allFeatures.description: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

allFeatures.name: Fast Movement
allFeatures.description: +10 ft speed when not wearing heavy armor.

allFeatures.name: Savage Attacks
allFeatures.description: On crit with melee weapon, roll one damage die extra.

allFeatures.name: Relentless Endurance
allFeatures.description: 1/long rest: drop to 1 HP instead of 0.

allFeatures.name: Wanderer
allFeatures.description: Excellent memory for terrain; can forage for food/water.

backgroundFeature: Wanderer: Excellent memory for geography and natural features.
